docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BECKER BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT SEIT YVONNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BECKER BENJAMIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEIT YVONNE $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,012.79, FOR ALL CLAIMS INCLUDING PROPERTY DAMAGE OF $255.77. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SEIT YVONNE HEARING SET FOR AUG-24-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SEIT YVONNE

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF AUG-24-1992, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT SEIT YVONNE
